mapper.sql: address_id, user_id, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, full_address, tag, is_default, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail}, full_address = #{fullAddress}, tag = #{tag}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM address WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 0, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
